assumptions.baseline: severity-zero identity/baseline/pristine/reference/self rows; otherwise the median of severity-zero rows
assumptions.bbox_coordinates: expected_bbox and predicted_bbox use one common coordinate system
assumptions.compound_components: components column or compound:family_a+family_b family name
assumptions.compound_rule: compound score <= every named component score on the expected axis
assumptions.deterministic_repeat: duplicate sample_id/category/family/severity/seed rows are reruns of one exact case
assumptions.missing_values: counted as abstentions when the expected axis is applicable
assumptions.multi_axis_targets: expected_axis may join axes with '+'; target response and severity ordering are evaluated on every named axis, never silently dropped
assumptions.score_direction: higher axis values mean better fidelity
assumptions.severity_direction: larger severity means a stronger defect; zero means invariant/pristine
